page_metadata.biotools__summary: PE-Designer is a web-based design and analysis tools for CRISPR prime editing. It is a JavaScript-based instant assessment tool for high-throughput sequencing data for CRISPR prime edited cells.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PE-Designer is a web-based design and analysis tools for CRISPR prime editing. It is a JavaScript-based instant assessment tool for high-throughput sequencing data for CRISPR prime edited cells.
